name: Claude Code CLI
description: Installs Anthropic's Claude Code CLI (@anthropic-ai/claude-code) via npm, with optional Node.js auto-install.

version.description: Version of @anthropic-ai/claude-code to install (npm dist-tag or semver, e.g. 'latest', '1.0.0').

installNode.description: Install Node.js (via NodeSource) if 'node' is not already on PATH. Disable if you supply Node yourself.

nodeVersion.description: Major Node.js version to install when installNode is true (e.g. '18', '20', '22').

installCcdAlias.description: Install a shell alias 'ccd' => 'claude --dangerously-skip-permissions' system-wide (bash + zsh). DANGEROUS: bypasses Claude Code's permission prompts. Only enable inside a hardened sandbox.
